ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was registered in the system */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_demographics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of the treatment (e.g., Medication, Therapy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "standard_dosage" TEXT /* Standard dosage for the treatment */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the treatment */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Contraindications for the treatment */,
  "interaction_warnings" TEXT /* Interaction warnings for the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-treatment assignment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment assigned to the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  "administered_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who administered the treatment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the treatment */,
  "adherence_status" TEXT /* Adherence status of the patient to the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the clinic */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the clinic */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the clinic director */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_clinic_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-clinic association */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the patient started being treated at the clinic */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the patient stopped being treated at the clinic */,
  "primary_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the primary doctor treating the patient at the clinic */,
  "visit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of visits to the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_clinic_associations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_clinic_associations_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_type" TEXT /* Type of the diagnosis (e.g., Parkinson's Disease) */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who made the diagnosis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of the follow-up visit (e.g., Routine, Emergency) */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the follow-up visit */,
  "conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who conducted the visit */,
  "chief_complaint" TEXT /* Chief complaint or reason for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the trial started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the trial is expected to end */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., Recruiting, Active, Completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator for the trial */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the trial */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Study design (e.g., Randomized Controlled Trial, Observational Study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_trials" (
  "patient_trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-trial participation */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient participating in the trial */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the patient started participating in the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient's participation (e.g., Active, Completed, Withdrawn) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the patient's participation */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Adverse events experienced by the patient during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_trials_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_trials_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "data_changed" TEXT /* Data that was changed or affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., wearable device, electronic health record) */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string or API key for the external data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization with the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
